why_thailand.subtitle: Open Your Future
why_thailand.description: In 2024, over 3,137 companies committed $33 billion to Thailand — a 10-year record. Here's why they didn't think twice.
why_thailand.strategic_location_desc: You're not just entering Thailand — you're opening the door to the world's fastest-growing consumer region. ASEAN is yours.
why_thailand.workforce_desc: World-class talent at a fraction of the cost. Your future team is already here, trained and ready.
why_thailand.digital_infra_desc: From EEC smart zones to nationwide 5G — the infrastructure doesn't just support your ambition, it accelerates it.
why_thailand.incentives_desc: Tax holidays up to 13 years, duty-free imports, 100% foreign ownership. Your profits stay yours.
why_thailand.quality_of_life: Live Where the World Wants to Visit
why_thailand.quality_of_life_desc: International schools, world-class healthcare, and a cost of living that lets your talent thrive — not just survive.

hero.subtitle: BOI offers both tax and non-tax incentives to strengthen your business competitiveness in Thailand.

tax.description: BOI categorizes incentives into 3 tiers based on activity type and conditions. Higher value-added activities receive greater benefits.
tax.a1_plus_desc: For advanced technology, innovation, and S-Curve industries with the highest value-added.
tax.a1_desc: For important activities using advanced technology with positive economic impact.
tax.a2_desc: For activities using modern technology that help develop the supply chain.
tax.benefit_cit_13: Corporate income tax exemption up to 13 years with no cap
tax.benefit_cit_8: Corporate income tax exemption up to 8 years
tax.benefit_import_duty: Import duty exemption on machinery and raw materials
tax.benefit_deductions: Double deductions for R&D, utilities, and training expenses

non_tax.title: Additional Benefits That Make Business Easier
non_tax.description: Beyond tax incentives, BOI provides non-tax benefits to facilitate business operations.
non_tax.foreign_ownership_desc: Full foreign ownership permitted in BOI-promoted activities without requiring a Thai partner.
non_tax.land_ownership_desc: Permission to own land for operating BOI-promoted activities.
non_tax.forex_desc: Freely remit profits, dividends, and capital back to your home country.
non_tax.work_permit_desc: Facilitated visa and work permits for foreign experts and technicians.
non_tax.expert_visa_desc: Long-term 4-year visa for experts, executives, investors, and startups.
non_tax.guarantees_desc: Guaranteed against nationalization and competition with promoted enterprises.

hero.subtitle: For over 58 years, BOI has been the bridge connecting global investors with unlimited opportunities in Thailand.

vision_mission.description: BOI is committed to promoting valuable investments, strengthening national competitiveness, and elevating the quality of life for all Thai people.
vision_mission.vision_desc: To be the nation's leading investment promotion agency, enhancing Thailand's competitiveness and driving the country toward a sustainable economy.
vision_mission.mission_desc: To promote, support, and serve both Thai and foreign investors — increasing investment value in target industries, strengthening supply chains, and developing Thailand's economy.
vision_mission.values_desc: Service excellence, transparency, innovation, results-driven, good governance, and embracing change to truly meet the needs of investors.

timeline.title: 58 Years of Opening the Investment Gate
timeline.m1966_desc: The Board of Investment of Thailand was established under the Investment Promotion Act of 1966 to attract both domestic and foreign investment.
timeline.m1977_desc: Legislation updated to expand benefits and increase flexibility in investment promotion, attracting greater foreign direct investment.
timeline.m1993_desc: Launched the OSOS center providing visa, work permit, and all services in one place — cutting through bureaucratic red tape.
timeline.m2001_desc: Opened 8 regional investment promotion offices covering all areas of Thailand, plus overseas offices worldwide.
timeline.m2015_desc: Shifted to a new cluster-based investment strategy, focusing on target industries and special economic zones for greater economic value.
timeline.m2017_desc: Spearheaded the Thailand 4.0 policy and Eastern Economic Corridor (EEC), attracting S-Curve industries and advanced technology.
timeline.m2019_desc: Introduced Smart Visa for global experts, executives, investors, and startups — attracting world-class talent to Thailand.
timeline.m2022_desc: Promoted Bio-Circular-Green (BCG) economy toward sustainable development, with special incentives for green industries.
timeline.m2025_desc: Full digital service transformation — online applications, AI chatbot assistance, and real-time investment data dashboards.

leadership.description: BOI is governed by the Board of Investment under the Prime Minister, with over 800 experts serving investors worldwide.
leadership.sg_quote: BOI is committed to being the Gate Opener — making investment easy, fast, and transparent to drive Thailand's economy forward.
leadership.dept_promotion_desc: Analyzing, approving, and monitoring BOI-promoted investment projects.
leadership.dept_international_desc: 16 overseas BOI offices serving investors around the globe.
leadership.dept_services_desc: Visa, work permit, OSOS, and post-promotion services.
leadership.dept_regional_desc: 8 regional offices serving investors across all areas of Thailand.

detail.sample_title: BOI Approves New EV Incentive Package for 2026
detail.sample_lead: The Board of Investment of Thailand has approved a comprehensive new incentive package designed to accelerate the growth of the electric vehicle industry, offering enhanced tax benefits and expanded support measures for manufacturers and supply chain partners.
detail.sample_heading_1: Key Highlights of the New Package
detail.sample_paragraph_1: The new EV incentive package includes an extension of the corporate income tax exemption period to up to 13 years for qualifying investments, along with import duty exemptions on machinery and raw materials essential for EV production. The package also introduces additional deductions for research and development activities in battery technology and charging infrastructure.
detail.sample_highlight: The new package is expected to attract over ฿150 billion in new investment over the next five years, creating more than 30,000 high-skilled jobs in the EV sector.
detail.sample_paragraph_2: Beyond tax incentives, the BOI is introducing a suite of non-tax measures including streamlined permit processing for EV-related projects, dedicated visa facilitation for foreign experts, and enhanced coordination with government agencies to expedite project approvals.
detail.sample_paragraph_3: The package reflects Thailand's commitment to becoming a regional hub for electric vehicle manufacturing and innovation, supporting the country's goal of having 30% of domestic vehicle production be electric by 2030.
detail.newsletter_desc: Get the latest investment news and updates delivered to your inbox.

hero.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about BOI investment promotion, incentives, and application process.

general.what_is_boi_q: What is the Board of Investment (BOI)?
general.what_is_boi_a: The Board of Investment of Thailand (BOI) is a government agency under the Office of the Prime Minister that promotes and facilitates domestic and foreign investment in Thailand. Established in 1966, BOI offers tax and non-tax incentives to eligible businesses across various industries.
general.who_can_apply_q: Who can apply for BOI investment promotion?
general.who_can_apply_a: Both Thai and foreign investors can apply for BOI investment promotion. Applicants must have a registered company or be in the process of establishing one in Thailand. The business activity must fall within BOI's list of eligible activities.
general.how_long_q: How long does the BOI application process take?
general.how_long_a: The standard processing time is approximately 40–60 working days from the date of a complete application submission. Complex projects or those requiring additional review may take longer. BOI offers an expedited process for certain high-priority projects.

eligibility.eligible_activities_q: What business activities are eligible for BOI promotion?
eligibility.eligible_activities_a: BOI promotes a wide range of business activities across sectors including agriculture, manufacturing, services, and technology. The eligible activities list is updated periodically and organized into categories (A1+, A1, A2, A3, A4, B1, B2) based on the level of incentives offered.
eligibility.minimum_investment_q: Is there a minimum investment amount?
eligibility.minimum_investment_a: Yes, the minimum investment capital (excluding land and working capital) is generally 1 million baht. However, some activities may have higher minimum requirements depending on the category and type of business.
eligibility.foreign_ownership_q: Can foreign investors own 100% of the company?
eligibility.foreign_ownership_a: Yes, BOI-promoted companies in manufacturing and certain service sectors can be 100% foreign-owned. This is one of the key advantages of BOI promotion, as it provides an exception to Thailand's Foreign Business Act restrictions.

application.how_to_apply_q: How do I apply for BOI promotion?
application.how_to_apply_a: Applications can be submitted online through the e-Investment system or in person at BOI offices. You will need to complete the application form, provide a feasibility study, and submit supporting documents such as financial projections and company registration documents.
application.documents_needed_q: What documents are required for the application?
application.documents_needed_a: Required documents include the completed BOI application form, feasibility study, financial projections, company registration documents (or pre-registration agreement), project implementation plan, and environmental impact assessment (for applicable activities).
application.processing_time_q: Can I track the status of my application?
application.processing_time_a: Yes, you can track your application status through the e-Investment portal. BOI also assigns a project officer who will be your point of contact throughout the process and can provide status updates.

incentives.tax_exemption_a: BOI offers corporate income tax exemption for 3–13 years depending on the activity category, import duty exemptions on machinery and raw materials, and additional deductions for R&D, training, and infrastructure development expenses.
incentives.non_tax_benefits_q: What non-tax incentives does BOI provide?
incentives.non_tax_benefits_a: Non-tax incentives include permission for foreign majority ownership, permission to own land, facilitation of work permits and visas for foreign experts, permission to remit foreign currency abroad, and protection against nationalization.
incentives.zone_benefits_q: Are there additional benefits for investing in special zones?
incentives.zone_benefits_a: Yes, investments in special zones such as the Eastern Economic Corridor (EEC), Special Economic Zones (SEZ), and Science & Technology Parks receive enhanced incentives including extended tax holidays, additional corporate income tax reductions, and infrastructure support.

compliance.reporting_q: What are the reporting requirements after receiving promotion?
compliance.reporting_a: BOI-promoted companies must submit annual operating reports and comply with the conditions stated in the promotion certificate. This includes maintaining minimum investment levels, production capacity requirements, and employment conditions.
compliance.revocation_q: Under what circumstances can BOI promotion be revoked?
compliance.revocation_a: Promotion can be revoked if the company fails to comply with the conditions in the promotion certificate, provides false information in the application, fails to submit required reports, or does not commence operations within the specified timeframe.
compliance.extension_q: Can I extend my BOI incentives period?
compliance.extension_a: In certain cases, BOI may approve extensions for specific incentives. Companies investing in approved science and technology activities, or those located in targeted provinces, may be eligible for additional years of corporate income tax exemption.

grid.title: All Services at Your Fingertips
grid.e_investment_desc: Submit and track your BOI promotion applications online. The comprehensive digital platform handles everything from initial application to post-approval reporting.
grid.visa_work_permit_desc: Apply for and manage visa extensions and work permits for foreign employees of BOI-promoted companies through our streamlined online system.
grid.smart_visa_desc: Apply for the Smart Visa program designed for highly-skilled professionals, investors, executives, and startup entrepreneurs.
grid.osos_desc: Access multiple government services in one place. OSOS provides coordinated assistance for permits, licenses, and registrations.
grid.hq_portal_desc: Dedicated portal for regional operating headquarters (ROH) and international headquarters (IHQ) operations in Thailand.
grid.after_promotion_desc: Manage your promoted projects including extensions, amendments, and annual reporting through BOI's post-approval service portal.
grid.consultation_desc: Schedule a free consultation with BOI investment advisors to discuss your project plans and eligible incentive packages.
grid.tax_calculator_desc: Estimate your potential tax savings and incentive benefits based on your investment type, amount, and location.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information in accordance with PDPA.

sections.intro_text: The Board of Investment of Thailand (BOI) is committed to protecting the privacy of visitors to our website. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, in compliance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) B.E. 2562 (2019).
sections.collection_text: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when using our services, including: name, email address, phone number, company information, and investment-related inquiries submitted through contact forms.
sections.auto_text: When you visit our website, we automatically collect certain information including IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, pages viewed, and timestamps. This data is collected through cookies and similar technologies.
sections.use_text: We use collected information to: provide and improve our services, respond to inquiries and consultation requests, send relevant investment information and updates, analyze website usage patterns, and comply with legal obligations.
sections.sharing_text: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with government agencies as required by law, authorized service providers who assist in website operations, and as required by court order or legal process.
sections.retention_text: We retain personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by applicable laws and regulations. Audit logs are retained for a minimum of 365 days.
sections.rights_text: Under PDPA, you have the right to: access your personal data, request correction of inaccurate data, request deletion of your data, withdraw consent, request data portability, and file complaints with the Personal Data Protection Committee.
sections.security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including encryption, access controls, and regular security assessments in compliance with OWASP standards.
sections.contact_text: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your PDPA rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer at: dpo@boi.go.th or visit our Contact page.

terms_page.title: Terms of Use
terms_page.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the Board of Investment of Thailand website.

sections.acceptance_text: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of the terms, you may not access the website.
sections.use_text: This website is provided to disseminate information about investment promotion in Thailand. You agree to use the website only for lawful purposes and not in a manner that infringes upon the rights of others.
sections.ip_text: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of BOI or its licensors and is protected by Thai intellectual property laws.
sections.disclaimer_text: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. While we endeavor to keep the information accurate and current, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied.
sections.links_text: This website may contain links to external websites not operated by BOI. We have no control over the content of those external sites and shall not be responsible for their content or privacy policies.
sections.changes_text: BOI reserves the right to modify or replace these terms at any time. Changes are effective immediately upon posting on the website. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
sections.governing_text: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Any disputes arising from the use of the website shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Thai courts.
sections.contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at: head@boi.go.th or visit our Contact page.

accessibility_page.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility_page.subtitle: Our commitment to making investment information accessible to everyone.

sections.commitment_text: The Board of Investment of Thailand (BOI) is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with diverse abilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone and apply the relevant accessibility standards.
sections.standards_text: This website strives to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 at Level AA. These guidelines define how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities. We also comply with Thailand's DGA (Digital Government Agency) digital accessibility standards.
sections.features_text: Our website includes the following accessibility features: adjustable text size and spacing, high contrast and dark mode options, keyboard navigation support, screen reader compatibility, alternative text for images, ARIA landmarks and labels, focus indicators for interactive elements, and a comprehensive accessibility widget.
sections.widget_text: Use our accessibility widget (accessible via the icon in the bottom-left corner) to customize your browsing experience. Features include content scaling, font size adjustment, line height and letter spacing controls, heading and link highlighting, contrast modes, grayscale mode, cursor highlighting, and text-to-speech.
sections.feedback_text: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of this website. If you encounter accessibility barriers or have suggestions for improvement, please contact us at: accessibility@boi.go.th or use the contact form on our website.
sections.ongoing_text: We are continually working to improve accessibility. Our efforts include regular accessibility audits, staff training on accessible content creation, and testing with assistive technologies.

hero.title: Thailand at a Glance
hero.subtitle: A dynamic economy at the heart of ASEAN with world-class infrastructure and a skilled workforce

content.economy_desc: Thailand's GDP exceeds $574 billion, making it the 2nd largest economy in ASEAN. With consistent growth averaging 3.5% annually and a diversified industrial base spanning automotive, electronics, and agriculture.
content.strategic_desc: Positioned at the heart of ASEAN's 680 million consumer market, Thailand offers unparalleled access to major Asian markets. Within 5 hours flight to half the world's population.
content.infrastructure_desc: Thailand boasts 38 deep-sea ports, 6 international airports, extensive highway networks, and growing high-speed rail connections linking Bangkok to regional hubs.
content.workforce_desc: Over 500,000 STEM graduates annually, with a workforce of 39 million. Thailand invests heavily in upskilling through government-industry partnerships and technical institutes.
content.quality_desc: Ranked among Asia's most livable countries with world-class healthcare, international schools, vibrant culture, and affordable cost of living for expatriates.

hero.title: Target Industries
hero.subtitle: Explore Thailand's priority sectors with enhanced BOI incentives for eligible activities

grid.title: Industries Driving Thailand's Future
grid.agriculture_food_desc: From farm to table — Thailand is the world's kitchen, a global leader in food processing and agricultural innovation with BCG-driven sustainability.
grid.medical_desc: Asia's medical hub with world-class hospitals, pharmaceutical manufacturing, and a thriving medical device industry.
grid.automotive_desc: The Detroit of Asia — ASEAN's largest auto producer now pivoting to become a regional EV manufacturing hub with dedicated incentive packages.
grid.electronics_desc: A major global hub for hard disk drives, semiconductors, and integrated circuits with growing smart device manufacturing capabilities.
grid.metals_desc: Comprehensive supply chain for steel, aluminum, and advanced materials supporting Thailand's manufacturing ecosystem.
grid.chemicals_desc: Southeast Asia's largest petrochemical industry centered in the Eastern Seaboard with integrated industrial complexes.
grid.utilities_desc: Transitioning to clean energy with solar, wind, and biomass projects supported by enhanced BOI incentives for green technology.
grid.digital_desc: Thailand's digital economy is booming with data centers, fintech, AI/ML, cloud services, and software development driving the new economy.
grid.creative_desc: Animation, gaming, film production, and design — Thailand's creative sector is rapidly growing with dedicated promotion measures.
grid.services_desc: Regional headquarters, international trading companies, and business process outsourcing with special non-tax incentives.

hero.title: Special Economic Zones
hero.subtitle: Enhanced incentives and streamlined processes in Thailand's designated economic corridors

content.eec_desc: Thailand's flagship development zone spanning Chachoengsao, Chonburi, and Rayong — the epicenter of advanced manufacturing and innovation.
content.eec_benefits: Up to 15 years CIT exemption, Land ownership for foreigners, Fast-track permits, EECi innovation zone, EECd digital park
content.sez_desc: 10 border zones designed to promote cross-border trade and investment with neighboring countries including Myanmar, Laos, Cambodia, and Malaysia.
content.sez_benefits: Additional 3-year CIT reduction, Double transport cost deduction, Utility infrastructure support, Simplified customs procedures
content.industrial_desc: Over 60 managed industrial estates across Thailand offering ready-built facilities, utilities, and comprehensive support services.
content.industrial_benefits: Plug-and-play infrastructure, One-stop service centers, Environmental compliance support, Worker accommodation facilities

hero.title: Advertorials & Insights
hero.subtitle: In-depth articles on Thailand's investment landscape, industry trends, and success factors

list.title: Featured Insights
list.article_1_title: Thailand Attracts Record Foreign Direct Investment in 2025
list.article_1_excerpt: Thailand saw a 23% increase in FDI applications, driven by EV, digital, and green energy sectors across special economic zones.
list.article_2_title: EV Industry Boom: Thailand as ASEAN's Electric Vehicle Hub
list.article_2_excerpt: Major automakers are relocating EV production to Thailand, leveraging incentives and skilled workforce in the Eastern Economic Corridor.
list.article_3_title: New BOI Incentive Packages for BCG Economy
list.article_3_excerpt: BOI announces enhanced tax incentives for Bio-Circular-Green projects, supporting Thailand's sustainable development goals.
list.article_4_title: Smart Electronics: Thailand's Next Growth Frontier
list.article_4_excerpt: Semiconductor and advanced electronics investments surge as global supply chains diversify into Southeast Asia.
list.article_5_title: Digital Infrastructure Expansion Drives Tech Investment
list.article_5_excerpt: Thailand's 5G rollout and data center expansion create new opportunities for tech companies and digital services.
list.article_6_title: BOI Updates Foreign Business Regulations for 2026
list.article_6_excerpt: Streamlined procedures and expanded eligible activities aim to make Thailand more competitive for international investors.

hero.title: Getting Started
hero.subtitle: Your step-by-step roadmap to investing in Thailand with BOI promotion

content.title: From Inquiry to Operations in 5 Steps
content.description: A step-by-step guide for investors applying for BOI investment promotion
content.step1_desc: Explore eligible activities, understand incentive packages, and assess your project's alignment with BOI promotion categories.
content.step2_desc: Use our eligibility checker tool or consult with BOI officers to verify your project qualifies for investment promotion.
content.step3_desc: Submit your application through the e-Investment portal with required documents including project feasibility study.
content.step4_desc: Your application is reviewed by the BOI committee. Standard processing takes 60-90 business days.
content.step5_desc: Receive your promotion certificate and begin operations with BOI-supported permits, visas, and ongoing compliance support.
content.checklist_desc: Prepare the following documents before submitting your BOI application
content.timeline_desc: From application to promotion certificate: 60-90 business days. Fast-track available for EEC and priority industries.

hero.title: Check Your Eligibility
hero.subtitle: Find out if your investment project qualifies for BOI promotion in minutes

checker.title: Check Your Project Eligibility
checker.description: Answer simple questions to see if your investment project qualifies for BOI incentives
checker.step1_desc: Choose the industry sector that best matches your investment project.
checker.step2_desc: Choose the specific business activity you plan to undertake.
checker.result_subtitle: Your project qualifies for investment incentives
checker.cit_exemption_desc: Up to 8 years CIT exemption with no cap
checker.import_duty_desc: Exemption on machinery and raw materials import duties
checker.foreign_ownership_desc: 100% foreign ownership permitted in promoted activities

hero.title: Eligible Activities
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive list of business activities eligible for BOI investment promotion

list.title: Find Your Activity
list.description: Search and filter BOI-eligible activities by promotion category
list.search_placeholder: Search by activity name or keyword...
list.act_1_desc: R&D in biotechnology and bioproducts manufacturing
list.act_2_desc: Manufacturing of nanomaterials and advanced industrial materials
list.act_3_desc: Manufacturing of EVs and key components including batteries
list.act_4_desc: Software development, digital content and digital services
list.act_5_desc: Hospitals, medical facilities and integrated health services
list.act_6_desc: Manufacturing and MRO of aircraft and components
list.act_8_desc: Smart electronic devices and IoT manufacturing
list.no_results_desc: Try changing your search terms or filters

hero.title: Investment Procedures
hero.subtitle: Detailed guide to the BOI application process, required documents, and approval timeline

content.title: Application Process Overview
content.description: BOI investment promotion application process from document preparation to receiving your promotion certificate
content.step1_prepare_desc: Gather company registration documents, financial statements, and project feasibility reports
content.step2_submit_desc: Submit your application through the e-Investment system with all required documents and project details
content.step3_review_desc: Applications are reviewed by the relevant BOI sub-committee based on investment size and industry sector
content.step4_approval_desc: The BOI Board meets monthly to approve promotion applications. Results are notified within 7 business days
content.step5_certificate_desc: Upon approval, receive your promotion certificate and begin utilizing BOI benefits
content.docs_desc: Prepare the following documents before submitting your application

hero.subtitle: Download official BOI application forms, guidelines, and supporting documents

list.title: Download Center
list.description: Download official forms and documents for BOI investment applications

list.title: Official Announcements

list.ann_2_title: BOI Secretary General — e-Investment System Upgrade

hero.title: Investment Promotion Guide
hero.subtitle: Your complete reference for BOI investment promotion policies, incentives, and application procedures

content.title: Investment Promotion Guide
content.overview_desc: This comprehensive guide covers everything you need to know about investing in Thailand with BOI promotion — from eligible activities to incentive packages and application procedures.
content.ch1_desc: Overview of the Board of Investment, mission, and investment promotion framework.
content.ch2_desc: Complete list of promoted activities organized by promotion category (A1-A4, B1-B2).
content.ch3_desc: Corporate income tax exemptions, import duty exemptions, and additional tax benefits by category.
content.ch4_desc: Foreign ownership, land ownership, work permits, and visa facilitation benefits.
content.ch5_desc: Step-by-step application process, required documents, and processing timelines.
content.ch6_desc: Compliance requirements, reporting obligations, and ongoing BOI support services.
content.download_desc: Download the complete investment promotion guide in PDF format

hero.title: Apply for BOI Promotion
hero.subtitle: Submit and track your investment promotion application through our unified online portal

content.portal_desc: The e-Investment system is your single entry point for all BOI promotion applications. Submit, track, and manage your investment projects online.
content.feature5: Integration with visa and work permit systems

hero.title: e-Investment System
hero.subtitle: BOI's comprehensive digital platform for investment promotion management

content.about_desc: The e-Investment system is BOI's flagship digital service platform, enabling investors to manage their entire promotion lifecycle online — from initial application to post-promotion compliance.
content.service1_desc: Submit new investment promotion applications with all required documentation.
content.service2_desc: Apply for machine import permits, raw material import lists, and production capacity changes.
content.service3_desc: Manage foreign worker quotas, visa extensions, and work permit applications.
content.service4_desc: Submit required annual reports on project operations and compliance status.
content.faq1_q: How do I register for e-Investment?
content.faq1_a: Visit the e-Investment portal, click 'Register', and complete the registration form with your company details.
content.faq2_a: Company registration certificate, authorized signatory documents, and project details.
content.faq3_a: Standard applications are processed within 60-90 business days from complete submission.

hero.title: Visa & Work Permit
hero.subtitle: Streamlined visa and work permit services for BOI-promoted companies and their employees

content.overview_desc: BOI-promoted companies enjoy expedited visa and work permit processing through our single-window service, significantly reducing processing time and documentation requirements.
content.type1_desc: For executives, managers, and skilled workers in BOI-promoted companies. Valid up to 2 years with annual extension.
content.type2_desc: For foreign investors and board members of BOI-promoted companies. Allows multiple entries.
content.type3_desc: BOI work permits processed within 3 business days through the One Start One Stop service center.
content.benefit3: No need to visit Immigration Bureau separately

hero.title: Smart Visa
hero.subtitle: Special 4-year visa for highly skilled professionals, investors, executives, and startup entrepreneurs

content.about_description: The Smart Visa is designed to attract top talent and investors to Thailand's targeted industries. It offers a 4-year visa with work permit exemption and special privileges for family members.
content.cat_t_desc: Highly skilled professionals with expertise in targeted industries earning ≥200,000 THB/month.
content.cat_i_desc: Foreign investors investing ≥20 million THB in targeted industries.
content.cat_e_desc: Senior executives of companies with ≥50 million THB investment in technology or targeted industries.
content.cat_s_desc: Entrepreneurs joining Thailand's startup ecosystem through endorsed incubators or accelerators.
content.cat_o_desc: Spouses and dependents of Smart Visa holders with permission to work in Thailand.
content.benefit2_desc: Exempt from the requirement to obtain a separate work permit.
content.benefit3_desc: Reporting requirement reduced from every 90 days to once per year.
content.benefit4_desc: Travel in and out of Thailand without needing a re-entry permit.
content.benefit5_desc: Smart Visa holders' spouses and dependents are permitted to work in Thailand.

hero.title: One Start One Stop
hero.subtitle: Single point of contact for all investment-related permits and government approvals

content.about_description: The One Start One Stop (OSOS) Investment Center provides a single location for investors to obtain permits, licenses, and approvals from multiple government agencies — all under one roof.
content.service1_desc: Full-service company registration and business licensing assistance.
content.service2_desc: Visa and work permit processing for foreign employees.
content.service3_desc: Factory license applications and related permit processing.
content.service4_desc: Customs procedures and import/export documentation handling.
content.service5_desc: Tax registration and ongoing tax compliance services.
content.service6_desc: Environmental permit applications and related certifications.
content.location_address: 18th Floor, Chamchuri Square Building, Phayathai Road, Pathumwan, Bangkok 10330
content.partner3_desc: Work permits and foreign worker quotas.
content.partner4_desc: Visas and renewals for investors and foreign employees.

hero.title: Book a Consultation
hero.subtitle: Schedule a one-on-one consultation with BOI investment advisors at your convenience

content.booking_description: Our investment advisors are available for in-person meetings at BOI headquarters, video consultations, or phone calls. Choose your preferred time and topic.
content.form_note: Consultations are free of charge. You will receive a confirmation email within 1 business day.

hero.title: Investment Matchmaking
hero.subtitle: Connect with Thai partners, suppliers, and joint venture opportunities through BOI's network

content.about_description: BOI facilitates business connections between foreign investors and Thai companies, helping you find the right partners for joint ventures, supply chain integration, and local market entry.
content.service1_desc: Find qualified Thai suppliers and manufacturers for your supply chain needs.
content.service2_desc: Connect with established Thai companies seeking foreign investment partnerships.
content.service3_desc: Arranged visits to industrial estates and potential factory locations.
content.service4_desc: Regular industry networking events and investment seminars organized by BOI.
content.cta_description: Submit your requirements and our team will identify suitable matches within 5 business days.

hero.title: After Promotion Services
hero.subtitle: Ongoing support and compliance management for BOI-promoted companies

content.overview_description: After receiving your BOI promotion certificate, our team continues to support your operations with permit management, compliance guidance, and administrative services.
content.service1_desc: Apply for and manage machine import permits, raw material lists, and production capacity amendments.
content.service2_desc: Manage approved positions, bring in foreign experts, and process visa/work permit renewals.
content.service3_desc: Submit required operational reports and maintain compliance with promotion conditions.
content.service4_desc: Request changes to your promotion certificate including capacity expansion, product additions, or timeline extensions.
content.req1_desc: File yearly operational reports by the deadlines specified by BOI.
content.req2_desc: Comply with the required ratio of Thai to foreign employees.
content.req3_desc: Invest the capital amount specified in the promotion certificate within the required timeframe.
content.req4_desc: Report all duty-exempt machine and raw material imports.
content.req5_desc: Keep financial records and documentation to support audits and inspections.

hero.title: HQ Business Portal
hero.subtitle: Special incentives for companies establishing regional headquarters in Thailand

content.about_description: Thailand offers attractive packages for companies establishing International Headquarters (IHQ), Regional Operating Headquarters (ROH), and International Trading Centers (ITC) in the country.
content.type1_desc: Full corporate income tax incentives for management, technical, and support services to affiliated companies.
content.type2_desc: Reduced corporate tax rates for regional management and support services across ASEAN.
content.type3_desc: Special incentives for international procurement, sales, and distribution operations based in Thailand.
content.benefit1_desc: Lower tax rates on income from services provided to affiliated companies.
content.benefit2_title: Personal income tax exemptions for expatriates
content.benefit2_desc: Foreign executives and specialists enjoy personal income tax reductions.
content.benefit3_desc: Full 100% foreign ownership allowed without requiring a Thai partner.
content.benefit4_title: Streamlined visa and work permit processing
content.benefit4_desc: Fast-tracked visa and work permit procedures for foreign staff.
content.benefit5_desc: Qualified transactions are exempt from foreign exchange restrictions.

hero.title: BOI Offices
hero.subtitle: Head office, regional offices across Thailand, and overseas representative offices worldwide

hero.title: Careers at BOI
hero.subtitle: Join Thailand's leading investment promotion agency and shape the future of foreign investment

content.why_description: Be part of an organization that drives Thailand's economic growth by attracting and supporting global investment.
content.benefit1_desc: Directly influence Thailand's investment landscape and economic development.
content.benefit2_desc: Work with international investors, attend global events, and gain cross-cultural experience.
content.benefit3_desc: Continuous learning opportunities, overseas training, and career advancement pathways.
content.benefit4_desc: Comprehensive benefits including pension, health insurance, and family support.
content.step_1_desc: Prepare your resume, cover letter, and supporting documents for the position of interest.
content.step_2_desc: Submit your application through the government recruitment portal or email hr@boi.go.th.
content.step_3_desc: HR will contact shortlisted candidates to schedule an interview.

hero.title: Press Center
hero.subtitle: Press releases, media contacts, press kits, and media accreditation information

content.release_1_excerpt: The Board of Investment approved projects worth a combined 50 billion baht.
content.release_2_title: BOI Launches New Digital Industry Promotion Measures
content.release_2_excerpt: New incentives to attract investment in the technology and innovation sector.
content.release_3_title: Foreign Investment in 2025 Reaches Record High
content.release_3_excerpt: Foreign investment applications increased 30% compared to the previous year.
content.release_4_title: BOI Signs MOU with Japan Investment Promotion Agency
content.release_4_excerpt: Cooperation to promote Thailand-Japan investment in targeted industries.
content.press_kit_desc: Download our media kit including BOI logos, fact sheets, leadership photos, and brand guidelines.
content.media_contact_desc: For press inquiries or interview requests, please contact the Public Relations Division.
content.media_spokesperson: Public Relations Division, Board of Investment of Thailand
content.accreditation_desc: Members of the press seeking accreditation for BOI events, please submit your credentials at least 5 business days before the event.

hero.title: Procurement
hero.subtitle: Government procurement announcements, price references, and bidding information

content.no_items_desc: Please check back regularly for updates.
content.transparency_desc: BOI is committed to fair, transparent procurement processes in accordance with the Government Procurement and Supplies Management Act B.E. 2560.
